itemListElement.reviewBody:
I’m excited to talk about my time at Gyanshree School Noida, which has been consecutively rated as one of the best schools in Noida. My time there was a fantastic mix of great academics and all-round development.

Infrastructure: Gyanshree’s infrastructure is very impressive. The labs are packed with good equipment, making hands-on learning both fun and effective. The sports complex is amazing, including squash courts and a 25-meter pool with hot water during the winter months. Inside the classrooms, the air conditioning and digital smart boards make learning comfortable and engaging. Plus, with multiple libraries and a large amphitheatre, there’s always a place for studying and being creative. And there’s even a new auditorium being built!

Extracurricular Activities: Gyanshree shines when it comes to extracurriculars. I got to partake in various Model United Nations (MUNs) debate competitions, including 'Perspectiva', Gyanshree's own annual debate competition. Hosting events like Teacher's Day was a great way to build my organizational and public speaking skills. One of my favourite memories was performing a flute solo in 'Abhimanch 2017' —proof of how much the school supports the arts. I also had a blast on the basketball team, competing in CBSE clusters, and my three years on the prefectorial board were crucial for developing my leadership skills.

Education: The very first characteristic of a good school is its education, and I can comfortably say that the quality of education at Gyanshree is top-notch. The teachers, who we affectionately call Shree-Gurus, were incredibly supportive and played a huge role in helping me get into a great college. The school’s scholarship programs are also fantastic for recognizing and encouraging student talent.

In short, Gyanshree School Noida stands out as the best school in Noida. With its amazing facilities, diverse extracurricular opportunities, and excellent education, it’s a place where students can truly thrive. I’m proud to have been part of this awesome institution.

They keep raising school fees by 10% every year without fail, making it increasingly unaffordable in the near future. Meanwhile, the quality of teaching has been declining. Extended vacation periods, wrapping up yearly exams by early March, which leaves nearly a month without school or studies before the new session starts. I don’t understand why they don’t use those extra days to better prepare students for the exams instead of rushing through them and leaving so many non-school days.
One of the finest school in the region. Very good ambiance, talented teachers and good focus on academics and activities.

Gyanshree School has been a wonderful choice for my twins. The overall exposure is good, with a variety of sports facilities. The teachers are polite and corporative and can reach out easily. I am satisfied with the education (practice through worksheets and other activities) they provide to children.

My daughter is in Grade 4 and she like to sing and her vocal skills is improving day by day with the guidance of school musical department. Sargam Ma’am from music department is very kind and my daughter love to learn new things with ma’am.

The building and playground of this school is awesome. They have the best cricket academy and having best cricket coaches. My son who is in grade 4 love to play cricket and he join school cricket academy too. His game is improving day by day. Kajal ma’am and M.P. Singh Sir is helping him. Recently he was selected in School Cricket Team U-10 and won award for Maximum Wicket Taker in Match.

Overall, I am a happy parent and highly recommend Gyanshree School for the holistic growth of a child.

Very nice school with caring Teachers and Staff. School has one of the best sports facilities and coaches, being affiliated to Khelo India initiative. Vocational courses into food technology is a very innovative program. Thank you!

I am thrilled to share my wonderful experience with Gyanshree as a parent, finding a nurturing and academically stimulating environment for my son and daughter was paramount, and this school has exceeded all my expectations.
The teachers are not only knowledgeable and passionate about their subjects but also genuinely care about each student's growth and well-being.
My son particularly enjoys the various clubs and sports teams, which have helped him develop new skills and interests.
Communication between the school and parents is excellent. I am always kept informed about my kid’s progress and any upcoming events. The administration is approachable and responsive, ensuring that any concerns are addressed promptly.
Overall, Gyanshree is a fantastic place for children to learn, grow, and thrive. I highly recommend it to any parent seeking a supportive and enriching educational environment for their child.
Thanks
Suman

Gyanshree School has been a wonderful choice for both my children. The overall exposure is excellent, with a variety of sports facilities and numerous interschool competitions that greatly contribute to students' growth. Recently, the schoolchildren participated in MUN, and I am delighted to share that the entire team won the first prize.  We are grateful to the dedicated teachers and the supportive management at Gyanshree.
One of the best schools in every aspect in the whole NCR
